name: Apple Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons mixed spice (cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves and allspice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, baking soda, and mixed spice in a large bowl.
2. Add the apple pie filling, raisins, beaten egg, and melted butter to the dry ingredients. Stir until all ingredients are well combined; the mixture will be sloppy.
3. Pour the batter into a greased muffin tin or lined 12-cup baking dish.
4. Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Makes 12 muffins.
